case_title: MARTINIE JANICE DBA BILL'S FINEST PRODUCE CO. VS MARKET ROASTERY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINIE JANICE DBA BILL'S FINEST PRODUCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY $1,627.70 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,642.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,627.70 FILED BY MARTINIE JANICE DBA BILL'S FINEST PRODUCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-30-1994, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
